mapper.select: SELECT reservation_id, customer_name, phone, treatment_id, reservation_datetime, status, delay_status, delay_message, created_at FROM reservation ORDER BY reservation_datetime ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO reservation ( reservation_id, customer_name, phone, treatment_id, reservation_datetime, status, delay_status, delay_message, created_at ) VALUES ( seq_reservation.NEXTVAL, #{customerName}, #{phone}, #{treatmentId}, #{reservationDatetime}, #{status}, #{delayStatus}, #{delayMessage, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP )
mapper.select: SELECT reservation_id, customer_name, phone, treatment_id, reservation_datetime, status, delay_status, delay_message, created_at FROM reservation WHERE customer_name = #{customerName} AND phone = #{phone} ORDER BY reservation_datetime DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM reservation WHERE reservation_datetime = #{reservationDatetime} AND status = 'RESERVED'
SELECT TO_CHAR(reservation_datetime, 'HH24:MI') FROM reservation WHERE TO_CHAR(reservation_datetime, 'YYYY-MM-DD') = #{reservationDate} AND status = 'RESERVED' ORDER BY reservation_datetime
